allow: Bash(node -e "const path = require\(''path''\); const d = path.join\(__dirname, ''dist/server/server''\); console.log\(''__dirname would be:'', d\); console.log\(''../../.. ='', path.join\(d, ''../../../dist/renderer''\)\); console.log\(''exists?'', require\(''fs''\).existsSync\(path.join\(d, ''../../../dist/renderer/index.html''\)\)\)")
